lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear that I can present you with an offering and you will enchant my lyre for me.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: This is true. For a simple enchantment, you may place an offering on my Altar. Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: I offer you this enchantment for your worthy offering.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: A raw bass? You should know that is not a worthy offering, outerlander.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, you're right - I'll find something more worthy of you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you enchant my lyre so that the enchantment will never fade?

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: If the offering is great enough, I would be happy to offer you such a powerful enchantment.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: Depending on your familiarity of the area, I will require less of an offering.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: But for you, I would have you offer me 1000 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik easy diary, it would have been 800.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: But for you, I would have you offer me 800 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik medium diary, it would have been 600.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: But for you, I would have you offer me 600 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik hard diary, it would have been 400.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: But for you, I would have you offer me 400 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik elite diary, it would have been 200.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: But for you, I would have you offer me 200 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: You still need to offer me [number] raw shark, [number] raw manta ray, [number] raw sea turtle and [number] raw bass.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: While I appreciate the thought of offering me fish, I am afraid I am unable to use the air you have offered me.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: Many thanks for your offering. You still need to offer me [number] raw shark, [number] raw manta ray, [number] raw sea turtle and [number] raw bass.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: You have given me a worthy offering, and I will bestow my enchantment whenever you bring me a suitable lyre. I regret I cannot return any of your fish in future, even if you become closer to the Fremenniks.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: I offer you this enchantment as you have earned my favour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will come back when I have an offering worthy of this power. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: Farewell then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, sorry.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: Do not summon me for idle conversation! Come back when you have an offering.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: You do not have a lyre with you that I can enchant. It must have been strung, but it cannot bear any existing enchantment.

lines.speaker: Fossegrimen
lines.text: I offer you this enchantment as you have earned my favour.
